title: Fans react to Stephen Colbert’s final show
full_text:
Fans react to Stephen Colbert’s final show
Fans lined up outside the Ed Sullivan Theater one last time for “The Late Show” as Stephen Colbert prepared to host his final episode, marking the end of the franchise’s 33-year run on CBS. The network announced last summer that the show would end, calling it “purely a financial decision against a challenging backdrop in late night". Colbert took on the show in September 2015 after David Letterman retired from the role he'd held for 22 years.
